stories.title: Series Preview — Cubs Open 3-Game Road Series at Pittsburgh

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs (57-45) open 3 games at Pittsburgh (53-50) tonight. 5:40 PM CT at PNC Park.

Game 1: Boyd vs Jones. Saturday: Imanaga vs Skenes — the matchup everyone's circling.

Both teams in the Wild Card race. Pirates right on the bubble. ⚾

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Wild Card Stakes — This Series Carries Playoff Implications

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
This series isn't a tune-up. It's a playoff preview.

Cubs: 57-45, No. 1 NL Wild Card. Pittsburgh: 53-50, half a game outside the Wild Card field.

Cubs sweep and they're in command. Pirates take it and they're in the hunt. 💪

#Cubs #MLB #NorthSiders

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Matthew Boyd has been the Cubs' most reliable arm in July.

4-game win streak. Sub-2.50 ERA. 23 K in his last four starts since returning from injury.

He's the rotation anchor this team needed — and he starts tonight in Pittsburgh. 🔥

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

stories.title: Trade Deadline — 10 Days, Bullpen in Crisis

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
10 days to the August 3 deadline.

Phil Maton just hit the IL for the THIRD time this season — right knee tendinitis, 3-week prognosis.

Trent Thornton is day-to-day with a heel injury.

Hoyer has to move. 📢

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Pete Crow-Armstrong is building one of the best Cubs seasons in years. ⚾

.291/.386/.531, 21 HRs, 24 SBs, 6.0 WAR.

In June he topped all qualified MLB players with a 1.249 OPS. NL Player of the Month. The MVP case is real.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Pre-Game Hype — Boyd vs Jones at PNC Park

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
First pitch at PNC Park in 40 minutes. 🔥

Matthew Boyd brings a 4-game win streak into Pittsburgh. Jared Jones returns from Tommy John surgery tonight trying to match him.

Wild Card standings on the line. The Cubs don't back down. Let's go.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
